vertical-slices.evidence: "Split into `orders/` and `inventory/` feature modules, each owning its own data access and business logic."

factory-di.evidence: "Fix: `createOrderService({ db, emailClient, logger })` returning a plain object. The composition root (`server.ts`) is the only place that knows about concrete `Pool` and `fetch`."

crosscutting-via-wrapping.evidence: "Fix: Apply `withTracing(orderService)` / `withLogging(orderService)` wrappers at the composition root."

structured-api-errors.evidence: "Every error response is `{ message: "..." }` — not machine-readable, no error type, no error code, no HTTP status in the body." Fix: "Define a structured error format: `{ type, code, status, detail }`."

api-first.evidence: "Define an OpenAPI spec (or at minimum route-level schemas) before writing handlers. Runtime validation (Zod) is complementary but not sufficient."
